title: Block of Thieves
body:
**Pirate adventure modpack!!!**

- Sail! Loot! Fight! Better with friends!
- Ship the world!
- Ship the The Nether and The End dimensions!
- Custom schematics of ships for create cannon!
- Defeat all the bosses!
- Explore all the dungeons!

**Main features**

- Create your own multi-block ship (Or steal it!)
- Pick up chests and barrels of treasure on your ship 
- Use the grappling hooks to board other ships
- Use cannons and muskets!
- Lots of ocean structures to loot and explore, including moving ships!
- Large oceans!
- Use your ship as a base
- Grow cultures in pots
- Lots of bosses and dungeons

**Highly recommended to play with friends**


- Musket Mod: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/daniinatorul]
- Valkyrien Relogs: [https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-relogs]
- Grimdark Pirate Pack: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pirate]
- Pirate illagers: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pirate-illagers]
